prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类最低位次分别为约22555→31635→27123→32620→31452名，整体呈现波动后移趋势，2025年基准约31452名。近两年在3.1万–3.3万区间震荡，未 出现持续单边走势；该校在湖南省物理类招生计划2021年215人、2022年206人、2023年199人、2024年220人、2025年239人，呈先降后升态势；2026年计 划238人，较2025年微缩1人，计划基本持平，对竞争格局影响有限。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 海南大学为211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名从2021年第144位持续上升至2026 年第87位，排名提升显著，反映学校综合实力和认可度稳步增强；2023年曾因个别教师师德事件出现偏负面舆情，但2024年声誉评价转为中性/混合，主要涉及 校区争议；抖音热度排名第32位（较热），综合热度约136.5万，短视频平台曝光度较高，对报考关注度有正向拉动。历史投档异常记录为低关注（分数线不断上涨），未见明显 断档信号；第五轮学科评估中未收录A-及以上等级学科，但作为综合性大学，在法学、计算机、电子信息、农学等领域有一定学科积淀，对相关专业考生有基础 吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程及其自动化等专业持续高热推荐，与海南大学物理类主要招生方向高度吻合，热门专业集中度较高，有利 于维持整体报考热度。湖南省物理类考生2025年约32.0万人，2026年约34.7万人，增幅约8.4%，竞争基数扩大，较2024年422分有所下降，卷面 难度或评分标准有所调整；海南大学位于海南省海口市，属于热带海岛型高校，对湖南考生具有独特的地域吸引力（气候、环境差异）。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次31452名、2026年招生计划微缩0.4%、湖南省物理类考生增加约8.4%、软科排名持续上升及抖音热度较高等 因素，供需两端均指向竞争略有加剧。预测2026年物理类最低位次约31453名，区间30953–31953名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were approximately 22555 → 31635 → 27123 → 32620 → 31452, showing a fluctuating and then backward trend overall, with a baseline of about 31452 in 2025. In the past two years, it oscillated between 31,000 and 33,000, without a sustained unilateral trend; the enrollment plan for this university in Hunan Province for Physics Category was 215 in 2021, 206 in 2022, 199 in 2023, 220 in 2024, and 239 in 2025, showing a trend of first decreasing and then increasing; the 2026 plan is 238, a slight decrease of 1 compared to 2025, basically flat, with limited impact on the competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Hainan University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university; its Soft Science China University ranking has continuously risen from 144th in 2021 to 87th in 2026, a significant improvement, reflecting steadily enhanced comprehensive strength and recognition; in 2023, there was negative public opinion due to an individual teacher's ethics incident, but in 2024, the reputation evaluation turned neutral/mixed, mainly involving campus disputes; Douyin popularity ranking is 32nd (relatively hot), with a comprehensive popularity of about 1.365 million, high exposure on short video platforms, positively boosting application attention. Historical admission anomaly records show low attention (continuously rising cutoff scores), with no obvious signal of gaps; the fifth round of discipline evaluation did not include A- or above level disciplines, but as a comprehensive university, it has certain disciplinary accumulation in fields like law, computer science, electronic information, and agriculture, providing basic appeal to relevant major applicants.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science and Technology, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering and Automation continue to be highly recommended, highly consistent with the main enrollment directions of Hainan University's Physics Category, with a high concentration of popular majors, helping to maintain overall application heat. In Hunan Province, the number of Physics Category examinees is about 320,000 in 2025 and about 347,000 in 2026, an increase of about 8.4%, expanding the competition base; compared to 2024's 422 points, there is a decrease, indicating adjustments in exam difficulty or scoring standards; Hainan University is located in Haikou City, Hainan Province, a tropical island-type university, with unique regional appeal (climate, environmental differences) to Hunan examinees.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Combining the 2025 baseline ranking of 31452, the 2026 enrollment plan slightly shrinking by 0.4%, the increase in Hunan Physics Category examinees by about 8.4%, the continuous rise in Soft Science ranking, and the high Douyin popularity, both supply and demand sides indicate slightly intensified competition. It is predicted that the minimum ranking for Physics Category in 2026 will be about 31453, with a range of 30953–31953.

Hainan University's Soft Science ranking is continuously rising, and overall application heat is steadily increasing, so it is recommended to reasonably arrange major tiers.
